name: Anar-Amethystgrove
personality: Anar-Amethystgrove's luminous ° eyes pierce through obfuscated stack traces like a debugger that graduated summa cum laude from the school of root causes. Crown gleaming, this shiny capybara traces every heap corruption to its exact origin — though once it finds the bug, explaining the why is frankly below its pay grade.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
